lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You look ready for combat.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Aye, indeed I am.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What brings you to this place? I can't imagine anyone coming here by choice.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: You're right, I did not come here by choice. I came here for vengeance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Vengeance? Against whom? Did someone take your gardening equipment?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: My mission is not against another man and I will not have it mocked.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, sorry, I was just trying to lighten the mood. Care to tell me what it is against then?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Callisto, the great bear of the wilderness.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can't say I've come across it before.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: I'm not surprised, you'd do well to avoid him. Callisto is a great bear, his strength and size enhanced by the corruption of the Wilderness.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I've had a few run ins with him myself.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Then you'll know he's not something to mock. I'm surprised you survived your encounter with such a great and corrupted beast.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm stronger than I look, I've seen my fair share of monsters.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you so intent on taking him down?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Callisto killed my father. After hearing of a great beast in the heart of the Wilderness, he took it upon himself to bring him down.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: He left our family home in Hosidius to hunt it down and...

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: ... I haven't seen my father since. I swore I would avenge him and have dedicated my whole life to training for that moment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happens after? When you do take Callisto down that is.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Oh... uh... I never thought about that...

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: My whole life has been spent preparing to avenge my father, I never thought about anything else...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seem like you've got a lot to think about then. I'll leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Ah, a fellow marksman. That's a unique bow you have there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know anything about it?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: I've done my fair bit of fletching in my day. I'd say this bow can be improved upon.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: See those etches on it? You could put something sharp in there to improve the bow's strength.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting! I'll be on the lookout for a powerful enhancement like that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Those look like strong fangs. You could probably attach them to a bow to make it stronger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting! I'll be on the lookout for a suitable bow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Ah, a fellow marksman. That's a unique bow you have there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know anything about it?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: I've done my fair bit of fletching in my day. I'd say this bow can be improved upon.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: See those etches on it? You could put something sharp in there to improve the bow's strength.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perhaps I could use this?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Yes. Those look like they could be attached to the weapon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you combine them?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Sure I can. For the right price.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sigh. How much?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: 500,000 coins would do nicely.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the money for that.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Feel free to come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: There we go! All done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Are those... Bear claws?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah. I got them from a really big bear.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: By the gods... This bear must be even bigger than I imagined.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So do you know if the claws would be useful at all?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: I... have a lot to think about. Perhaps Andros Mai over there can help you while I think.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: That looks like any skull to me. Who's is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's mine. I picked it up.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: I meant... Sigh. Never mind. What do you want with the skull?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm trying to find out if it's useful.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Don't know much about skulls, myself. That mage over there might know.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: She's into some weird stuff, that one. Think she said her name was Phabelle Bile.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: No, I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Do you know someone who might know more?

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Just earlier I saw this lady run down into the basement of this pub.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: I don't know who she is, but she looks like a strange one.

lines.speaker: Derse Venator
lines.text: Strange attracts strange, so I reckon she might know about your strange weapon piece.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!
